case_title: MONTALVAN BEVERLY A VS AVILES PLUTARCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $675.00 FILED BY MONTALVAN BEVERLY A AS TO DEFENDANT AVILES PLUTARCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-05-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
